author: catwith1hat
content: That's very cool! My audit stuff above was somewhat agents free-styling the mapping. How do you keep that up to date?

author: stefanbratanov
content: Hey, it uses specrefs e.g. https://github.com/Consensys/teku/tree/master/specrefs which are based on ethspecify schemas https://github.com/ethereum/ethspecify they are static and maintained by clients so not up to date always, basically grab latest commit from each client for these files

author: stefanbratanov
content: Agents could be more accurate I presume for filling the gaps

author: jtraglia
content: Oh this is really neat! And yeah, not all clients have specrefs yet. I have been chatting with <@602753420033785856> from Lighthouse about it, but they're skeptical of their value. And [we made a branch](https://github.com/0xTylerHolmes/nimbus-eth2/tree/add-specrefs) with some specrefs for Nimbus (cc <@654267572107083777>) but never completed it & therefore never made the PR 😢
